zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于短期震荡偏弱结构，价格围绕1580附近反复整理，整体仍受均线压制，反弹动能有限，市场情绪偏谨慎，缺乏明确方向突破信号

MACD指标显示轻微多头动能，但缺少信号线确认，短线动能不足；价格低于SMA20均线1585，说明上方存在压力，反弹持续性待观察

下方支撑位关注1570一线及1565区域，若跌破或进一步下探；上方阻力集中在1581与1585附近，突破后看向1600目标位

短线建议以区间高抛低吸为主，未有效突破1585前不宜追多，回踩1570附近可分批布局多单，严格设置止损控制风险以防极端波动

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading in a narrow consolidation phase after a mild 24-hour decline of 0.30%. Price action remains compressed between 1570 and 1581, indicating short-term indecision. The broader intraday structure leans slightly bearish as ETH continues to trade below the 20-period SMA. This suggests that upside momentum is temporarily capped, while buyers are only absorbing pressure near recent lows without initiating a strong reversal.

Momentum signals present a mixed picture. The MACD remains slightly positive at 0.45, but without a visible signal line reading, momentum appears to be flattening rather than expanding. With RSI unavailable, price behavior relative to the SMA20 at 1585.94 becomes more important. Trading below this average reflects a cautious bearish bias, though the lack of strong downside expansion implies consolidation rather than aggressive selling pressure.

Immediate support is forming around the 1570 level, which has already been tested as the session low. A decisive break below this zone could expose downside continuation toward 1555 and potentially 1540. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 1581, followed by stronger supply near the 20-day SMA at 1585–1586. A breakout above this range would be required to shift structure back toward a bullish recovery attempt.

For trading strategies, range-bound approaches remain preferable while price stays between 1570 and 1585. Short positions may be considered near resistance with tight stops above 1586, targeting mid-range support. Conversely, long setups become more attractive only on confirmed rebounds above 1585 or clear rejection of 1570 support with bullish confirmation. Risk management is essential given the tight compression, as volatility expansion could occur quickly.
